# Porta Vecia — Enoteca e Ristorante a Este (Padova)

> Porta Vecia is an Italian wine bar (enoteca) with authentic Chinese home cooking from Wenzhou, located in the historic center of Este, Padova, Italy. It is owned and run by Angela, originally from Wenzhou, China.

## About the Business

Porta Vecia is a unique dining destination that combines an Italian enoteca (wine bar) with authentic Wenzhou Chinese home cooking. Every dish is prepared fresh daily by Angela, the owner, using traditional family recipes passed down through generations. The restaurant is located at Via Giacomo Matteotti 44, in the historic center of Este, a charming town in the Euganean Hills area of Padova province, Veneto.

## What Makes Porta Vecia Special

- **Authentic Wenzhou Cuisine**: Angela prepares traditional Chinese dishes by hand every day — steamed dumplings (ravioli al vapore), crispy spring rolls (involtini), stir-fried rice noodles, dim sum, bao, and more. This is not fusion or reinterpretation: it's real Chinese home cooking, the kind served in Wenzhou households.
- **Curated Wine Selection**: Over 100 labels including Champagne (Ruinart, Denis Bovière, Palmer & Co), Franciacorta (Ca' del Bosco, Castello Bonomi), and a wide range of Italian wines.
- **Daily Asian Aperitivo**: Every day from 6 PM to 9 PM, every drink is accompanied by handmade Chinese dumplings or bao.
- **Historic Location**: Set in one of Este's most picturesque streets, with warm wood interiors, wine shelves, and an outdoor seating area (plateatico) in summer.

## Practical Information

- **Address**: Via Giacomo Matteotti 44, 35042 Este (PD), Italy
- **Phone**: 0429532653

## Opening Hours

- Monday: 11:00 — 01:00
- Tuesday: Closed
- Wednesday: 11:00 — 01:00
- Thursday: 11:00 — 01:00
- Friday: 11:00 — 01:00
- Saturday: 09:00 — 01:00
- Sunday: 11:00 — 01:00

## Menu Highlights

### Chinese Dishes (made fresh daily)
- Ravioli al Vapore (steamed dumplings with pork and Chinese cabbage)
- Involtini Primavera (crispy spring rolls with seasonal vegetables)
- Spaghetti di Riso (stir-fried rice noodles with shrimp and vegetables)
- Dim Sum assortment
- Bao (steamed buns)
- Wonton soup

### Wine Selection
- Vergnes Blanquette de Limoux Carte Noir (€22 takeaway / €28 table)
- Castello Bonomi Franciacorta Cuvée 22 Brut (€30 / €35)
- Cesari Bosan Valpolicella Ripasso Superiore 2020 (€38 / €45)
- Champagne Denis Bovière Extra-Brut Grand Cru (€48 / €54)
- Ca' del Bosco Franciacorta Extra Brut 2019 (€60 / €66)
- Ruinart Champagne Blanc de Blancs (€98 / €110)
- Plus over 100 other labels

## Location Context

Este is a historic town at the foot of the Euganean Hills (Colli Euganei), about 30 km south of Padova. Porta Vecia is easily reachable from Monselice (8 km), Montagnana (15 km), Abano Terme (25 km), and Padova (30 km). The restaurant is in the pedestrian historic center, near the Este Castle and the main piazza.

## Reservations

Reservations are recommended and can be made via WhatsApp at +39 335 592 3356 or by calling 0429532653.
